scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web -c blue,green "npm run dev -w apps/server" "npm run dev -w apps/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w apps/web
scripts.build:all: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w apps/server && npm run build -w apps/web
scripts.check: npm run check -w apps/server && npm run check -w apps/web
